content:
if anything I think people misinterpreted them and we will still get the same amount of males in year 3 but the females should be closer to year 1
we know Xu is from 2021, and they still have a lot of unreleased designs that was made before the game even launched
even the ones we got in year 2 are still their old unreleased designs
and if we take account to how the year 1 roster look, we can guess that the unreleased roster should be roughly the same

thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content: People want different things. Some people like female characters, other male characters, nothing wrong with that. I have every single character in the game and some of my favorite designs are women, but I still came to this game because of good ratio of male-female units. So this news can be concerning to people.
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content: I don't mind male or female characters bc their design is peak regardless. But it'll be a lie if I say that I support and spend a lot of money into the game with the idea that the male-female ratio will be somewhat balanced. Not 1:1 because that's high hope but definitely not 1:3 like year 1. And I'm sure that there's not a small amount of player base that came here with that same idea too. So if they want to change it back, I wish I had a solid reason for this change, not a simple "this is a sensitive topic" and dodge the question completely. This development among other updates has greatly reduced my affection so my stay will depend on their answer. That's why I have to ask them and make them consider it
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content: Yeah, it's a bad phrasing, bad timing (with the whole +12 thing) and generally just poor response. It soured my mood as well, though I try to stay positive and go into "wait and see" approach. I feel like especially so called 'husbando-enjoyers' have been baited so often by various games that it is a legitimate worry. My friend is also like one bad response away from leaving, so I do hope there's no more bad news.
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content: My main concern is about the **ratio**, not the **amount**. If we're talking about the limited alone then year one ratio is 1:2 while counting standard is 1:3. But year 2 is different because the newly released is 6 females to 4 males. If they're going back to year 1 ratio, and with the rate of releases of new awakeners, I'll be lucky if I have 2 male awakeners **for a whole year**

content:
<@633215996508766229> 想起一件很重要的事，被最終法則的事情鬧太大被蓋掉了我差點忘記
就是你那個幻夢深淺的計分方式，這遊戲很大一個樂趣就是帶著不同配隊打幾個小關卡後帶著各種造物打王，你現在改得這麼重回合數，大家在一定回合內結束戰鬥，反而是按著大家的頭玩同固定的強勢配隊，也缺乏肉鴿特色了，以前分界域排名、拿造物加分、只算最終戰回合數可不可以酌情考慮改回來
